result.stdout:
Microsoft (R) API Portability Analyzer v2.8.14+6dbb909fac
Copyright (C) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

This tool analyzes .NET assemblies to determine possible problems moving between .NET platforms (such as
Windows Store, desktop, Mono, .NET Core, etc) as well as between .NET Framework versions (ie 4.x->4.y).

To learn more about how this tool works, including the data we are collecting, visit https://aka.ms/dotnet-portabilityanalyzer.

For the full privacy statement, please visit https://privacy.microsoft.com/en-us/privacystatement
result.stderr:
usage: ApiPort <command> [<args>]

    analyze              Analyzes specified files/directories for IL and
                         determines the APIs that are used. This
                         information is analyzed for portability
                         concerns or known breaking changes (depending
                         on input parameters) and returns a report that
                         gives a summary of issues and possible steps
                         forward.
    dump                 Write the analysis request to the output file
                         without sending any data to the service
    listTargets          Use to see the available targets against which
                         you can validate your assemblies
    listOutputFormats    Use to see what output formats are supported
                         for the generated report.
    docId                Provides an interactive console search for
                         APIs. Useful to find the docid of a specific
                         API
